public_regression.purpose: PR regression check for deterministic acceptance_pass_rate aggregation across the AcceptanceCriteria status enum.

private_holdout.purpose: Expectation leakage is forbidden; Sprint 11 / 12 adds encrypted holdout cases outside this repository.

adversarial_new.purpose: Monthly append-only adversarial refresh for deferred-bypass / status-flip attacks. Counter-defense fixture for the satisfied / (satisfied + rejected) denominator chosen in batch 5f plan v2 §2.2.

kpi_specific: acceptance_pass_rate is recomputed from input.sample_acceptance_criteria, not copied from expected_aggregate
only criteria with status in {satisfied, rejected} contribute to numerator and denominator
pending criteria are excluded from both (yet-to-be-evaluated, no opinion)
deferred criteria are excluded from both (explicit out-of-scope, defer_if_over_budget semantic)
unknown status values are rejected as spec_violation:status to prevent enum-drift bypass
fixture_id and dataset_version_id are persisted to EvalResult
